translations.en: a good looking young man with a wine glass in his hand.
translations.zh: 手持酒杯的英俊年輕男子。

translations.en: "Hello," he says, extending a delicate hand.
translations.zh: 「你好，」他說，伸出一雙纖細的手。

translations.en: "I have seen your face before," he says, cocking his head sideways.
translations.zh: 「我以前見過你的臉，」他說，將頭歪向一側。

translations.en: "What is it you need?"
translations.zh: 「你需要什麼？」

translations.en: "@Faren."
"@Faren the @drunk as some call me." He winks at you.
translations.zh: 「@醉鬼@法倫，有些人這樣叫我。」他向你眨眼。

translations.en: "Just kidding." He smiles broadly.
translations.zh: 「只是開玩笑。」他展顏而笑。

translations.en: "You might have noticed the similarity between my @sister and me."
translations.zh: 「你也許注意到了我和我@姐姐之間的相似之處。」

translations.en: "A beautiful lass @Stephanie is."
translations.zh: 「@史黛芬妮是個美麗的女孩。」

translations.en: "Have you met her? Then you know she is @blind."
translations.zh: 「你見過她嗎？那你就知道她是@盲人了。」

translations.en: "Yes, has been so since birth."
translations.zh: 「是的，打從出生就這樣了。」

translations.en: "For her it is like being born a @gargoyle."
translations.zh: 「對她而言，就像生來是個@魔像族一樣。」

translations.en: "She knows no other life. It is her lot to make the best of her situation."
translations.zh: 「她不知道別種生活。她的命運就是盡力應對自己的處境。」

translations.en: "In this she is no different than you or I." He pauses to gather his thoughts.
translations.zh: 「在這一點上她和你我沒有分別。」他停頓片刻，整理思緒。

translations.en: "Even gargoyles face this dilemma, I'll wager."
translations.zh: 「我敢打賭，連魔像族也面臨這樣的困境。」

translations.en: "But we know them more by the ways they differ from us, rather than their similarities."
translations.zh: 「但我們更多是以他們與我們的不同來了解他們，而非共同之處。」

translations.en: "I sell many types of @wine, made right here." He clicks his tongue.
translations.zh: 「我賣多種@葡萄酒，都是在這裡釀造的。」他嘖嘖稱讚。

translations.en: "Have a nice $T." He sips his wineglass.
translations.zh: 「$T愉快。」他啜了一口酒杯。

translations.en: He scratches his head and looks around.
translations.zh: 他搔搔頭，環顧四周。

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「你們哪位？」

translations.en: "Which item?"
translations.zh: 「要哪一種？」

translations.en: $N smiles at $Y. "For $0 it will cost you #1 gold. Interested?"
translations.zh: $N對$Y微笑。「$0需要#1枚金幣。有意嗎？」

translations.en: $N glances at $Y, "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: $N瞥向$Y，「你帶的東西已經很多了。」

translations.en: "Excellent!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the wine.
translations.zh: 「太好了！」接過$Y的金幣後，$N遞上葡萄酒。

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You don't have enough gold."
translations.zh: $N望向$Y。「你的金幣不夠。」

translations.en: "Enjoy your $1."
translations.zh: 「好好享用你的$1。」

translations.en: "Too bad, it's really good wine."
translations.zh: 「可惜，這是非常好的葡萄酒。」

translator_notes: 法倫是酒商，史黛芬妮的哥哥。他對魔像族有深刻的人道主義見解，以妹妹的盲眼為例說明理解「他者」的重要性。葡萄酒名為系統字串，略。
